---
title: "Generalizing the Elo rating system for multiplayer games and races: why endurance is better than speed"
date: 2023-09-28
author: ["Ben Powell"]
publication: "Journal of Quantitative Analysis in Sports"
categories: ["Motor Racing","Statistical Methodology"]
url_source: https://eprints.whiterose.ac.uk/id/eprint/200471/1/Generalizing_Elo_deGruyter.pdf
url_preprint: 
journ: "Journal of Quantitative Analysis in Sports"
issue: 3
volume: 19
page: 223-243
year: 2023
image: image.png
editor: 'source'
---
